error_signature: checkbox does not toggle on first click
title: Checkbox not toggling on first click due to workflow binding
symptom: The checkbox does not change its state when clicked for the first time, but the click event is logged. Subsequent clicks work as expected.
applies_when: Workflow is bound to the checkbox HTML element
Checkbox is clicked for the first time
not_this_if: Workflow is set to 'On change' or 'On Init value change'
root_cause: Binding the workflow directly to the checkbox HTML element prevents the default toggle behavior on the first click. The event is triggered, but the checkbox state does not update until the second click.
fix_steps: Change the workflow binding from the HTML element to the checkbox component
Select 'On change' or 'On Init value change' for the workflow
agent_instruction: Rebind the workflow to the checkbox component instead of the HTML element.
